# Filzy

Filzy is a browser-first collection of file tools at https://filzy.site/.

## Core tools

- Beam: https://filzy.site/ — live file and folder transfer between connected devices. Filzy does not store a cloud copy of Beam files. The sender must remain online while the receiver downloads.
- Convert: https://filzy.site/convert — browser-side conversion for supported image, video, audio, data, and subtitle formats, with batch conversion and format-specific controls.
- Compress: https://filzy.site/compress — browser-side video, image, and audio compression by target size or percentage.
- Extract: https://filzy.site/extract — source-aware extraction for authorized YouTube media. It shows only qualities returned for the selected source. Some media requests may use Filzy's narrow streaming proxy; muxing and audio conversion run in the browser.

## Important focused pages

- PNG to SVG: https://filzy.site/convert/png-to-svg
- MOV to MP4: https://filzy.site/convert/mov-to-mp4
- WAV to MP3: https://filzy.site/convert/wav-to-mp3
- Compress video to 25 MB: https://filzy.site/compress/video-to-25mb
- Compress image to 1 MB: https://filzy.site/compress/image-to-1mb
- YouTube to MP3: https://filzy.site/extract/youtube-to-mp3
- YouTube to MP4: https://filzy.site/extract/youtube-to-mp4
- Send large files: https://filzy.site/send/large-files

## Guides

The Filzy guides hub is https://filzy.site/blog. It contains practical, human-readable explanations of vector tracing, image formats, video and audio compression, direct transfer privacy, and real media source quality.

## Accuracy and rights

- Filzy does not claim that upscaling creates genuine source detail.
- Target-size compression is an estimate; very aggressive targets require quality compromises.
- Media extraction is intended only for content the user owns or has permission to download.
- Pages for unsupported extraction providers are not published.
